professionals.name: Dr. Nyírő Melinda
professionals.bio: Founder of Köhögés Ambulancia. Graduated from Semmelweis University Medical School; later completed pulmonology specialty training. Worked in ambulance service, pulmonary hospital and outpatient settings, pulmonary care, and leadership roles in Budapest specialist clinics; has pharmaceutical, clinical trial, screening-program, and nonprofit foundation leadership experience.
